title: Notification No.19/2001-Cus(NT), dated 3.5.2001
text: 3rd May 2001 Notification No.19/2001-Customs (N.T.) In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962 ), the Central Government hereby appoints the Commissioner of Customs, Inland Container Depot, Tughlakabad, New Delhi to be- (i) the Commissioner of Customs(Import), New Custom House, Ballard Estate, Mumbai, (ii) the Commissioner of Customs, Air Cargo Complex, New Custom House, New Delhi, and (iii) the Commissioner of Customs, Air Cargo Complex, Sahar, Mumbai for the purpose of adjudicating the cases pertaining to the following parties/persons in respect of the show cause notice issued F.No.50D/33/99-CI dated the 4th December 2000 issued by the Additional Director General, Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, New Delhi, namely:- 1. M/s. Sundram Exports Pvt. Ltd, 214, Shahpuri Tower, C-58, Janak Puri, Behind Janak Cinema, New Delhi. 2. Shri Bimal Kumar Jain (R/o. HD-56, Pitam Pura, Delhi), Proprietor, M/s. Jain Enterprises, 17, Meera Tower, Wazir Pur Community Center, New Delhi - 110052. 3. Shri Deept Sarup Aggarwal (R/o.10/2, Sarvapriya Vihar, New Delhi-16), Proprietor, M/s.
